mkdir -p $WORK/b001/exe/
cd .
GOROOT='/usr/lib/go' /usr/lib/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/link -o $WORK/b001/exe/a.out -importcfg $WORK/b001/importcfg.link -installsuffix shared -X=runtime.godebugDefault=cryptocustomrand=1,tlssecpmlkem=0,urlstrictcolons=0 -buildmode=pie -buildid=h1Hyeg0uRtRJe1QbNL96/xITK5AfrJuCiiUnz3Zm3/6_3i3NYlypQRNg8xHmZp/h1Hyeg0uRtRJe1QbNL96 -X github.com/containerd/containerd/v2/version.Version=v2.2.5 -X github.com/containerd/containerd/v2/version.Revision=e53c7c1516c3b2bff98eb76f1f4117477e6f4e66 -X github.com/containerd/containerd/v2/version.Package=github.com/containerd/containerd/v2 -extld=x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc $WORK/b001/_pkg_.a
go tool buildid -w $WORK/b001/exe/a.out # internal
mkdir -p bin/
cp $WORK/b001/exe/a.out bin/gen-manpages
rm -rf $WORK/b001/
